entry.title: Re: SBO Failed to get database information from SLDClient...
entry.content:
Dear Bình 

It seems that the environment is affected by the scenario described in the notes. 

Notes:
+ 2950635 - Refresh Database User Is Required to Connect to an SAP Business One Company
+ 2825180 - Database Connection Is Lost When Logging on to SAP Business One

  Please apply the solutions suggested in the notes, if the problem remains, remove the instance from the SLD:

+ Remove the instance from the SLD
  - Open the web explorer and go the address: =https://<server_address>:40000/ControlCenter=
  - Go to the tap "DB Instances and Companies"
  - Select the database instance.
  - Use the delete button.
  - Add the instance of the database again.
  - Reboot server tools

Check issue again.

If still having same issue, please check if SDRQ table is missing from SBO-COMMON database.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.content: Is writing to SAP Datasphere using OData4 / REST supported?

I found default Sales area setting in EWM and this setting causes this error.

Thank you

Arata

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content:
3437779 - Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store error while creating Users/Groups, logging in with LDAP authentication In BI 4.3 SP04

 

Symptom

  • After update to 4.3 SP4 Patch 1, when trying to create a user or a group an error message shows up:
    "Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store error"

  • Not able to create Enterprise Users, Groups, Add new AD mapped groups. 
  • Issue seem to be happening only to customers using Oracle 19c or an Oracle DB as the CMS DB with BI version 4.3 SP4 Patch 100+
  • The issue may also occur when logging in with LDAP authentication:
    Account information not recognized: Internal error: An unknown exception has occurred


CMS logs may contain the following messages:

"CheckType: Not a valid type 3"

"Assert Failure: (Infostore.cpp:12526). (False : Unknown Exception caught while committing. Someone must be held accountable.)."

"InfoStoreSubSystem::CommitSingleObjectWithRetry"

"Unknown internal error encountered."

"OracleStatement.cpp"

Other Terms

User, group, ad, error, BI 4.3 SP4, Oracle, parameterization, CMS, DB, database,

Reason and Prerequisites

 Environment:

  • SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform 4.x (BI 4.2 / 4.3)
  • Windows
  • Linux / Unix 
  • Oracle 19c

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Update BI to 4.3 SP4 Patch 1
  2. Logon to CMC
  3. Go to Users and Groups
  4. Try to create a user or a group, receives an error: "Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store error"

Cause:

  • The issue is caused by a unsupported non-unicode NLS character set configured on the database level.

    Oracle has two values 'NLS_CHARACTERSET' and 'NLS_NCHAR_CHARACTERSET'
    which are responsible for data type of CHAR, VARCHAR2, LONG, CLOB data and NCHAR, NVARCHAR2, and NCLOB data respectively.
    When either of the 2 Character set values are set to anything that isn’t AL16UTF16 or AL32UTF8, then we encounter issues with the CMS converting UTF-16 strings to UTF-8 because of the use of a non-unicode character set.

  • For example 'WE8MSWIN1252’ (which is a Western European character set) is unsupported character set because it is non-unicode

  • We can determine those values by running the below SQL query:

    SELECT * FROM NLS_DATABASE_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER IN ('NLS_CHARACTERSET', 'NLS_NCHAR_CHARACTERSET');

Solution

  • The supportability of CMS Character sets for use in a CMS DB are documented in KBA 1462274
  • This is a limitation and restriction of the BI Platform product, where the CMS DB is required to use a unicode character set
  • If encountering this issue, please refer to your database vendor for further support on how to change your database's character set -- from our knowledge the character set cannot be modified once the database has been created otherwise there is a chance of data corruption, it must be set before the database is created.
  • The database must be configured as per our documentation, otherwise if using a unsupported configuraton the issue falls outside of SAP scope of supportability

entry.title: Re: How to mass download supplier attachments? SAP ByDesign
entry.content: Hi, unfortunately it would need to be separate app as the call is slightly different and therefore some of the logic

entry.title: Re: Dismantling of custom entities
entry.content:
Hi Isabelle,

Could you please share some insights on what will happen to the data which are part of these entities?

You can remove the entities from the UI for processing your change request, and governance scope and adjust the mappings accordingly.

The entities can be deleted from a technical perspective, however, proper testing should be performed to ensure the data integrity is maintained and the receiving systems are also able to consume the data sent from MDG. 

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: How to process Goods issue from Project stock through NW order
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

I know I can process goods issue against project stock using MIGO with 281Qmov. type.

But my customer's requirement is to process Goods issue from Project stock through multiple NW orders in bulk?

Is there any way to do that?

 

Best regards,

Arata

entry.title: Re: Making Customer Credit Limit (FD32) a sensitive field
entry.content:
Hi Marssel,

 We got similar requirement to make KNKK-KLIMK (Credit limit field) as sensitive field from FD32 and to approve from FD08/FD09.

 We are unable to do the SPRO configuration as we don't have field KNKK-KLIMK in drop-down list. 

Any suggestion would be appreciated.

 

Thanks,

Anil

entry.title: Issue with "Page down" and "Column width optimize" using SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY
entry.content:
Hello Team,
I am displaying internal table data using "Custom Container" in which we have also added "Sub screen" and some input fields.
However, we are unable to perform Page down and Column width optimize is not working.
Is it because we are using "Sunscreen and Input fields" in the same screen?

  IF CL_SALV_TABLE=>IS_OFFLINE( ) EQ IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>FALSE.
    CREATE OBJECT GR_CONTAINER_ASN
      EXPORTING
        CONTAINER_NAME = 'CUST_ASN'. "CONTAINER NAME OF ASN
*         LINK ALV GRID WITH CUSTOM CONTAINER OBJECT
    CREATE OBJECT O_GRID_ASN
      EXPORTING
        I_PARENT = GR_CONTAINER_ASN.
  ENDIF.

  PERFORM FLDCATVBAK_ASN .
  FREE IS_LAYOUT  .
  CLEAR : IS_LAYOUT .
  IS_LAYOUT-STYLEFNAME = 'CELLTAB'.
  IS_LAYOUT-CWIDTH_OPT = 'X'.
  IS_LAYOUT-INFO_FNAME = 'COLOR'.

 CALL METHOD O_GRID_ASN->SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY
    EXPORTING
      IS_LAYOUT       = IS_LAYOUT
      I_SAVE          = 'A'
    CHANGING
      IT_OUTTAB       = GT_ASN_FINAL
      IT_FIELDCATALOG = GT_FCAT[].

  CALL METHOD O_GRID_ASN->SET_READY_FOR_INPUT
    EXPORTING
      I_READY_FOR_INPUT = 1.

entry.title: Change System Status in PM order dependend to order Type
entry.content:
Hello guys,

we have a problem with auto releasing (system status REL) PM orders. It works totally fine with one order type but with the other one not.

Both order types have the setting in SPRO "release immediately"! Now on the SAP help page its written that several points are going to be checked by the system before the REL status can be set:

  • Availability check of components
  • Authorization
  • Billing rule
  • consistency check of user Status
  • Userexits

--> There are no components in the example

--> I checked with the same user so authorization should not be a thing (same for billing rule and user status?)

--> I tried to change the system status in user exit ZXWOCU07 via ABAP. But that change will later somehow be overwritten again.

 

Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Deployed HTML5 Web App
entry.content: Hi All, i am facing the same issue. are there any solutions for this issue yet ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarifica...
entry.content:
@mnic_17Yes, exactly. 4GT is not mandatory (but adds a lot of value to certain scenarios, of course).
Please find details about the options to create susbcriptions directly in SAP Subscription Billing here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/feature-overview/subscription-creation

Also to be worth knowing: SAP Subscription Billing can also be used in scenarios without S/4HANA Cloud. For example, based on the standard integration with S/4HANA onPremise. And here the solution order features and 4GT are not available at all.

Best regard
Stefan

entry.title: Re: I had public cloud and SAP BTP DMS service issue
entry.content:
Hi @vinay_singh38 

 

In S/4HANA Cloud its possible to use Harmonized Document Management where you can control if a object uses GOS or DMS

 

The documentation is available at  Harmonized Document Management (HDM)

The note https://me.sap.com/notes/3213661 mention in which app its works.

 

Please check and consider activating HDM for the object type involved if one of the apps mentioned in the note so it will use DMS instead of GOS

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Welcome @DearbhlaKeenan - I'm based in Galway and part of the SAP Community team. Hope you enjoy SAP Community! Let us know any time you have questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @Srinivasnun - be sure to check out our India location groups and see if there is one you would like to join!

entry.title: Re: CSRF Token for API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via OAUTH
entry.content:
Hello 

 

There's a good blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/maintain-assignment-of-document-info-record-to-maintenance-task-lists-via/ba-p/13574370 that outline how to setup 

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to use OAuth 2.0

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Message no. M7328 deficit of delivery quantity when doing MIGO 105
entry.content:
we have the following scenario:

one of our processes in purchasing and IM, is to receive the material with Mvt 103 and release it from blocked stock with Mvt 105.

suddenly, we started having issues in releasing the material:

Mvt 105 and also if we try to reverse the Mvt 103, give the message of Deficit of Delivered blStck qty 1 PC.

in MMBE I can see the material is there and I have checked all the movements.

this material is not new and has been received previously with 103/105 in this plant.

Any ideas of what I might additionally check?

thank you

Alisa

entry.title: Crystal Reports: "maximum report processing job limit"
entry.content:
I'm getting the error "maximum report processing job limit" in a Visual Studio .Net MVC web application published in IIS on a Windows server.

Already follow the suggestions in https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/what-exactly-is-maximum-report-processing-job-limit-for-crystal-reports/ba-p/13072654 but it still happens.

Also tryed to restart the site every nigth (using task shceduler) but it still happens.

Can't find a solution for this. Can you help me? I'm a "Crystal Reports for Visual Studio" user since a lot of years, and I want to continue being so, but I'm afraid that I will have to change for another reporting tool.

Thanks in advance

Damian.

entry.title: Re: Page down and Column width optimize is not working with SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY
entry.content: What exactly means "is not working"?

entry.title: Interface technologies supported by SAP BTP, ABAP environment
entry.content:
Dear all,

SAP BTP, ABAP is supposed to be used with the RAP Model and thus OData and REST as the technlogical base. However, of course there are other technologies like SOAP with WSDL, SAP RFC system calls, CSV files... I am wondering whether there is an overview showing which interfaces are supported when using BTP ABAP for both incoming and outgoing data. Does this exist somewhere?

Thanks for your assistance

Felix

entry.title: RAP: How to access child information while being on parent entity?
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Currently working on a Composition structure (Parent/Child) where I would need, based on a non-key field of the parent, to check whether a child is present or not. Currently, I am not seeing any straight forward way to see this as on the Create of the behavior implementation class, I only have access to parent data and, when standing on the CBA_Child, I only see the parent's key.

Answer is not as simple as "read through EML" as currently working with legacy FMs which is becoming a nightmare.

So far, the solution I could think of is to have a custom buffer which gets filled in on the Create and CBA_Child methods and, finally, gets checked on the CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE method. If I do not get there with the expected outcome, I can fill in the FAILED structure for the main entity and that will stop the commit.

Althought I believe this solution could work, it is not really efficient as I am doing all the process and only stopping before saving while, if I would be able to make the check on the handler class, I would avoid all this processing.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue?

Any advice from our experts @Andre_Fischer or @Renzo ? 🙂 

Thanks in advance! 

Alejandro.

entry.title: Is your Content “Scannable”?
entry.content:
By Dwight Anglehart, Jon Nowland, and Doug Savage

The “Welcome to the SAP Analytics Cloud Help” landing page uses interactive diagrams to help users quickly find their way around the tool. To learn more about the landing page and how it was created, we spoke to the information developer who wrote it, Joanna Denford. Joanna creates user assistance content in DITA, using IXIA CCMS. Link to topic: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/1fb1f4ce92f44fc983debc25ac1f2cc9.html

Hi Joanna. Your "Welcome to the SAP Analytics Cloud Help" topic presents two interactive diagrams: a “swimlane” diagram and a decision tree flowchart diagram. Can you tell us more about this approach, and maybe give us the background story on the topic? 
The diagrams came out of a larger project called Article-Based Help. This was an initiative championed by Sean McGregor, where the goal was to create “articles,” which are standalone documents that contain all the content that a user needs to answer a specific question or familiarize themselves with a feature set. I volunteered to lead the initiative and did several weeks of secondary research to figure out how to reorganize the high-level categories in our help and how to construct these new articles. 

You might have instead used text, tables, or videos. How did you come to this solution? 
One of the recommendations that kept cropping up was that users respond to more visual formats when trying to assimilate large amounts of information. As a result, once we finished our recategorization efforts, it just felt like the obvious next step would be to create some sort of diagram that would help users make sense out of the long list of categories. The hope was that this image would not only guide users but would also help us to make a good first impression, as this is the first page that they will likely see. 

I started with the decision tree because I was focused on the experience of the new user – the individual who is coming to SAP Analytics Cloud and its help content for the first time. I could see how this type of user could be overwhelmed and not know where to start, and then not know where to go next. However, my stakeholders pointed out that most users would be making return visits to the Help. A simpler format would be appropriate for those users, which is how we landed on adding the swimlane diagram. So, it wasn’t a case of either/or – clearly, both groups could benefit from a simple way to find what they’re looking for. 

Did you create the interactive diagrams yourself? If so, how did you learn to do that? 
Yes, I created the diagrams myself. PowerPoint is the required format for diagrams in IXIA CCMS; in a former job, I was lucky enough to work with a certified Microsoft Office trainer, who taught me a lot of tips and tricks for using PowerPoint effectively. If you have a license for Figma, you can also use that, and then use the Deck plugin to output it to PPT for uploading to IXIA CCMS.

How much time did it take to create the interactive diagrams?
Creating a diagram like this in PowerPoint should take only a day or two, thanks to some templates that our interns have created based on my specifications. Provided you know how to align and reformat shapes, it’s a straightforward process. 

What was the hardest part to creating the topic? 
It takes some practice to think visually, especially if you usually communicate using the written word. With the decision tree, the toughest part was figuring out the flow between the categories and what the decision points might be, and then how to lay that information out given the constraints of the web page. 

Writing pop-up labels requires precise, clear, and tight wording. How did you find that aspect of the writing? 
If you don’t manually define tooltips when creating the image map, the tooltips are automatically inherited from the short descriptions of the landing pages that the image map directs each hotspot to. Those are owned by other authors. So, in our earlier iterations, I just took advantage of this feature. However, our user research has since shown that users prefer diagrams to be less interactive; the ability to navigate to other articles is good, but they find big tooltips distracting and hard to review. As a result, when we recently updated the diagram style to match Fiori Horizon, we also took the opportunity to change those tooltips to a simple call to action: “Jump to [help topic].”

Have you had any feedback from users on the topic?
We haven’t focused on that page specifically in our research, but users frequently rate the page positively using the “Was this page helpful?” widget in the SAP Help portal.

You’ve recently interviewed and surveyed customers about your use of diagrams. Can you tell us a little about that? How did you reach out to customers, how many did you interview and survey, and what was their general response?
The survey was less about diagrams specifically, and more about the overall usability of the Help content, although we did ask about the effectiveness of the various forms of multimedia we create. We had 14 respondents to the survey, which was sent out to a standard pool of customers; we also conducted four interviews with external customers and three interviews with internal personal (mostly new learners). The interviews were arranged by reaching out to the appropriate CSPs, who contacted customers who have signed NDAs to see which were interested in participating.

With regards to the diagrams, the biggest takeaway from both the survey and the interviews was that our users prefer content that is easily scannable so they can find what they are looking for quickly. As a result, they favor numbered procedures, bulleted lists, tables, screenshots, and – of course – diagrams. So our next steps will be to explore how we can restructure our articles to prioritize those formats. It’s nice to know that our efforts in creating diagrams are appreciated!

Are you working on prototypes of other novel approaches to UA?
I’m part of a small team that creates video content to enrich the written Help articles, so I’m a big advocate of that format. You’ll find videos sprinkled throughout the Help wherever we think they will be most useful, and there’s a category at the bottom of the table of contents where you can find the entire catalog of videos. One of our big success stories is our “Get Started with Planning” video (https://youtu.be/n8lCJ5TY0bg), which uses some fun animation to explain a complicated topic. We are also experimenting with creating Simplified User Interface graphics instead of screenshots and building animated GIFs – basically, anything that will help users grasp a large amount of information in a short time. 

                                                    -----------------------------------------

If you have examples of cool, scannable content that you'd like to share, please do. We’re always looking for examples of all sorts of effective UA. And of course, your comments and suggestions are always welcome. Please weigh in!

entry.title: Re: Copy inspection results from SFG to FG in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Suresh_Eswaran 

 

The error "Data selection procedure & could not find any data, Message no. QECOPY010" is usually because the status of source physical results are not "5" (completed), Please check in Change Inspection Results - For Inspection Point / Display Inspection Results - For Inspection Point app

Please change all the status of source physical result to "5" by clicking on  "close" button in result recording screen. Then please try again.

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Valor do IVA não carrega na MIRO
entry.content: Conseguiu resolver o seu problema?

entry.title: WWI servers in RISE
entry.content:
Hello support,

We need the service WWI (Windows Workprocesor Integration) to generate documents in EHS, is there any availability to install it on RISE servers, or only is it possible to install it on OnPremise servers?

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Treasury Management_Public cloud_Change logs
entry.content:
How to find the financial transaction change logs in treasurey management.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Treasury Management_Public cloud_Change logs
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Financial transaction change logs can be seen from the App Process Financial Transaction  https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('FTR_EDIT')/S31

  1. To see the history of the financial transaction.
  2. Open the financial transaction in the App Process Financial Transaction.
  3. Go to Menu button > Facility > History.
  4. Menu > Environment > Change Document.

Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on parent entity?
entry.content:
Hi Alejandro,

I assume that you are using an unmanaged implementation? What about draft enabling the same. This way you should be able read the data via EML.

Or what about using a managed implementation with draft and unmanaged save?

Kind regards,  

Andre

entry.title: Re: SEN: Error message "Call was rejected by callee"
entry.content: This usually happens when a Add-in on Word prevents the javascript. We had similar error and later discovered that a Cybersec add -in on MS Word is preventing the document generation. We had to disable the Add in by updating the settings in MS Word.

entry.title: Re: How to get an invoice number on a quality certificate...
entry.content:
Hi @rohitpattar 

 

In S/4HANA Cloud we have the BADI QM_QCERTIFICATE_OUT_MODIFY  but the online documentation only mentions that it can be used for adding text to a quality certificate . If the BADI is not suitable then please follow 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ) and submit a feature request to have certificate number involved in the standard output

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Activity rate calculation
entry.content:
In Cocd A, Actual cost is zero in production cost-center XYZ where there is production during the month, so there is non-zero activity quantity.

The cost associated with production cost-center XYZ is recorded on a service cost-center ABC of Cocd B.

Now the question is, business for multiple reasons do not want to charge any cost on production cost-center XYZ and at the same time they want SAP to consider total cost on service cost-centre ABC and total quantity on production cost-centre XYZ while calculating activity rate on production cost-centre XYZ.

Is there any standard SAP solution for this requirement

Thanks

Kishore Jain

entry.title: Re: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)
entry.content: use that sql view in your amdp? if yes, i think it is nonsense.

entry.title: Re: SAP Audit log service - premium plan: What is the roa...
entry.content:
It is true, that the Premium edition service plan is now only available in CF-EU10, CF-EU11 and CF-US10 regions. Audit Log Service dev team is now working over the partial enablement (configurable retention) in other CF Data centers, where we have BTP Applications and customers, including CF-EU20. We expect that to be ready for customer adoption by end of next month - June 2024.

 

The other capability that the Premium edition service plan offers about the writing of audit data from customer-owned BTP Apps would remain available only in central CF regions (CF-EU10 and CF-US10) unless customer make explicit requests for enablement in a new region and provides strong motivation about it (in terms of volume expectations of incoming audit data).

 

Usually, customers can enable the premium edition through the BTP Cloud Cockpit and then to raise a request to the ALS team about the exact configuration of the retention period through a ticket. For more information, please check the Configurable retention section on this link.

entry.title: Re: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)
entry.content: @junwu  How ? if it is can u let me know best solution

entry.title: How to insert a record in custom business object from custom logic
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have a query on how to insert a record into one custom business object from custom logic of another custom business object.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to insert a record in custom business object from...
entry.content:
Hello Anuradha Rao,

I think this tutorial will help you in calling and updating CBO from your custom logic:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-extensibility-cbo-execute-outbound-service.html

Also there is a code sample of writing from one CBO to another (which may be what you're trying to do):

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/5769d4c3e91546199c3980a5546324d1.html?state=DRAFT&version=2408.500

entry.title: Re: Create Button not working in Manage Sales order Versi...
entry.content: check console or networktab for more information.

entry.title: Fiori ALP: Visual filter not visible
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have created a simple Analytical List Page with a visual and compact filter. But the visual filter is not displayed. The data source is a CDS view from S/4Hana. I have read through the blogs, but unfortunately this has not helped me.
I'm not sure whether the problem lies in the annotations or in my CDS view. I would be very grateful if you could help me.

Annotations:

<edmx:Edmx xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx" Version="4.0">
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Common.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1" Alias="Common"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/UI.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1" Alias="UI"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZBTP_C_SALESDOCUMENT_CDS/$metadata">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="ZBTP_C_SALESDOCUMENT_CDS" Alias="SAP"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:DataServices>
        <Schema xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm" Namespace="local">
            <Annotations Target="SAP.ZBTP_C_SalesDocumentType">
                <Annotation Term="UI.LineItem">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataField">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SalesDocument"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataField">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SalesDocumentItem"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataField">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="Material"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
                <Annotation Term="UI.SelectionFields">
                    <Collection>
                        <PropertyPath>Material</PropertyPath>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
                <Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="FilterFlightPriceAgencyID">
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Filter FlightPrice By AgencyID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Description" String="Filter FlightPrice By AgencyID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Bar"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>Material</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Measures">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>OrderQuantity</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
                <Annotation Term="UI.PresentationVariant" Qualifier="PVFilterFlightPriceAgencyID">
                    <Record Type="UI.PresentationVariantType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Visualizations">
                            <Collection>
                                <AnnotationPath>@UI.Chart#FilterFlightPriceAgencyID</AnnotationPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
             <Annotations Target="SAP.ZBTP_C_SALESDOCUMENT_CDS_Entities/ZBTP_C_SalesDocument">
                <Annotation Term="Common.ValueList">
                    <Record Type="Common.ValueListType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="CollectionPath" String="ZBTP_C_SalesDocument"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="PresentationVariantQualifier" String="PVFilterFlightPriceAgencyID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Parameters">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterInOut">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="Material"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="Material"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
        </Schema>
    </edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>

Best regards,

Halil

entry.title: How to make change Product allocation time series from ABAP layer
entry.content:
I have to make some changes to product allocation object from ABAP layer .I was looking for an API    that is released . I found in SAP API hub that we have a BO I_PRODALLOCATIONOBJECTTP_2 that can be accessed by EML .But we are on HANA 2021 I cannot find this BO (Screenshot attached below) .But we could find I_PRODALLOCATIONOBJECTTP which is not released . Neither I could find any BAPI .

https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_PRODALLOCATIONOBJECTTP_2

 Is  there any BAPI for product allocation Business context that is available or we can use I_PRODALLOCATIONOBJECTTP

entry.title: Re: Page down and Column width optimize is not working wi...

Hello,

In output, complete values are not getting displayed, generally when we use Column width optimize it displays’ complete value and when we hit Page Down from key board it is not going down. usually in ALV Grid output page down is used to scroll down the output data.

entry.title: Re: Dismantling of custom entities
entry.content:
Hi Anirban, 

the tables for our custom entities are no more needed when the legacy systems have been replaced. In the best case, these can be archived or deleted. The data that is still required is stored in standard SAP fields.

Best regards

Isabelle

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Enterprise Search Optimization
entry.content:
Hi @Leslie_Castle,

1. In my FLP, by default the dropdown is configured to "All" when i do search it is showing only limited Apps like 2 or 3.

2. I have changed the setting "DEFAULT_SEARCH_SCOPE_APPS" as true, then the dropdown is defaulted to "Apps" instead of "All".

My requirement:

As per point 2, can i able to set this config "DEFAULT_SEARCH_SCOPE_APPS" user specific without appliying globally for all

If not is it possible to display all apps when the dropdown is set to "All" as per point 1.

Please help.

SAP Fiori Launchpad

entry.title: SAP IAS SSO with SF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are using a third party (IDM- IDP) solution on premise. in the on-premise IDP, we are using a government ID only.

in SF we want to use employee no as a user ID for End users to login to SF and we want to configure SSO between SF and this 3rd party IDP which understand only Government ID as a user ID. 

can we use SAP Identity Authentication Services (IAS) as a proxy between SF and the on premise IDP to achieve this?

in SF the user ID(login ID ) will be the employee no that end users use to login to SF, then SF sends Employee no to IAS, in IAS custom attribute to be used to map employee no with government ID , then IAS identify the government ID of the received employee no then IAS sends government ID to IDP to complete the authentication .

is this possible ? IAS can help on this ? as SF doesn't have Government ID and IDP doesn't have employee no . we want IAS to do this mapping by somehow may be custom attributes and to establish the SSO.

your thoughts please .

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Dismantling of custom entities
entry.content:
Hi Isabelle,

Understood, in that case you can migrate your data from custom entities to the standard fields, and then phase out the entities.

If you feel your question is answered, please close the thread, or if you have further clarifications you can post them here 🙂

Thanks

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: CDS annotations to Show / Hide fields on Fiori based...
entry.content:
Hi,

My requirement is to hide field when checkbox is unchecked and vise versa. How to achieve that?

entry.title: Re: CDS annotations to Show / Hide fields on Fiori based on condition
entry.content: Hi Jessie and Mikhail, My requirement is to hide field when checkbox is unchecked and vise versa. How to achieve that?

entry.title: Dedicated OData Analytics APIs for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM offers a generic OData interface to access analytics of the differents use cases (Projects Management, Tasks Management, Health Monitoring...).

In addition to this generic OData interface, some use cases like "Requirements" provide an additional specific OData interface which is more convenient to use since it returns a dataset with the real name of dimensions and measures instead of generic names like d1k, d1v.

In SAP Analytics Clouds, you can consume the specific OData interface out-of-the-box by selecting the dedicated entity which is available using the same connection that you'd use to access the generic entity DataSet. Just select entity "Requirements" to access analytics of of SAP Cloud ALM Requirements scenario.

Depending on the scenario, you might have to filter some dimensions. In the case of Requirements all filters are optional which means you can just select all dimensions and measures you need and press "Next" to load all requirement analytics data in your model.

The frame time dimension "period" and "resolution" are still relevant with the specific interface and will impact the number of records returned. 

Once data imported in the SAP Analytics Cloud model you can manipulate the dimensions and measures using their real name as opposed to the generic DataSet interface which exposes generic dimension names (dxk,dxv) and generic measure names (mxk,mxv).

Although the format of generic OData interface and specific OData interface differ, they return the same content. 

References

  • SAP Cloud ALM Analytics API
  • SAP Business Accelerator Hub
  • Requirement analytics API
  • Access SAP Cloud ALM analytics from SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Access SAP Cloud ALM analytics catalog through OData interface

entry.title: Re: The Future Has Been Written – the Rise of the Database Administrator
entry.content:
@umairtambe The HC200 and the HA2HC are only available on learning.sap.com, you will not be able to find them in the SAP Learning Hub. If you follow the links in my blog, you will get the full learning content.

-- Hay

entry.title: Re: Dismantling of custom entities
entry.content: Hi Anirban, thanks for your answer. Do you know if SAP has a step for step guide for this? I only found a guide to implement custom entities? If there is nothing, I can will close the thread. Regards Isabelle

entry.title: How to enable the Category fields in the incident
entry.content:
Category field greyed out in ITSM


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable the Category fields in the incident
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

As specified in the wiki : https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sm/3518047382.html?locale=en-US > You will first need to assign Transaction Types to Catalog Categories

Using the Customizing activity Assign Transaction Types to Catalog Categories, you have to map a transaction type to a catalog category. This is required for the direct assignment of categorization schemas to transaction types.

Once this is done, you will need to create a categorization schema and Assign the Transaction type in the Application Area

Best Regards, 
Deepa
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: The Future Has Been Written – the Rise of the Database Administrator
entry.content: ok Thanks Again 🙂

entry.title: Re: Create Button not working in Manage Sales order Versi...
entry.content: nothing in the console or network tab.

entry.title: Como receber notificações por e-mail da comunidade SAP e cadastro de Newsletters
entry.content:
Como receber notificações por e-mail da comunidade SAP e cadastro de Newsletters

(SAP Community Subscriptions with E-mail and Newsletters)

Em janeiro de 2024, a SAP atualizou toda a plataforma SAP Community, e os e-mails de novas publicações, dúvidas e artigos que você se inscreveu e recebeu através do e-mail SAP Central Communication Service notificação@sap.com (Exemplo na imagem abaixo: “New blog post"), não é mais enviado.

Neste blog, irei apresentar a nova forma de como você pode se inscrever para continuar recebendo e-mails da comunidade.

💡Vantagem: Ao se inscrever para acompanhar as publicações da comunidade, você fica atualizado sobre novas funcionalidades e artigos do seu interesse, além de poder interagir e responder dúvidas de outros membros da comunidade.

Ao efetuar login com seu P-User (Usuário pessoal) na plataforma SAP Community https://community.sap.com/ , na direita da tela, clique no ícone configurações > “My content”.

Depois, no seu perfil, procure a opção “My Settings”.

 

Em “Subscriptions and Notifications” você pode configurar como deseja ser notificado e o que deseja assinar.

Por exemplo, no final de uma publicação da comunidade, você encontrará “Tags gerenciadas pela SAP”, clique nas tags que deseja ser notificado por e-mail.

Apenas clique em: “Subscribe” nas tag do seu interesse.

Em “Subscriptions & Notifications” > “My Subscriptions”, você pode listar quais tags você está inscrito.

Além disto, em “Subscriptions & Notifications” > “Notification Settings”, é importante revisar suas Notificações por E-mail para garantir que você receberá o e-mail.

Na imagem abaixo, é um exemplo do novo formato de recebimento de e-mail com a notificações da comunidade SAP.

Newsletters SAP

Caso seu desejo seja se inscrever em uma Newsletters SAP, acesse o site: https://www.sap.com/dashboard/newsletters.html

Você pode assinar o boletim informativo principal da SAP, para atualizações semanais sobre estratégia SAP, notícias, atualizações e eventos para clientes, clientes potenciais e parceiros SAP.

Espero que este blog tenha ajudado você a Como receber notificações por e-mail da comunidade SAP e cadastro de Newsletters.

Se você achou este blog útil, curta, siga e compartilhe o conhecimento.

Fique à vontade para deixar seu comentário ou tirar qualquer dúvida relacionada ao tema.

Clovis Müller

entry.title: Custom field added by extending Manage Service Entry Sheet are not getting updated
entry.content:
Dear Team,
I am extending the Fiori application Manage Service Entry Sheet - Lean Services. My requirement is to add 2 new custom fields ( Period From & Period To Dates ) in the item level of SES. These fields will be available in edit mode as well.

I added these two fields by extending the CDS view and appending the structure and transparent table. However the problem is that 'Period To' works fine while creating and updating SES, it is updated in db as well, however 'Period From' date does not work and when I try to provide a value in this field on UI, a merge call is done and I can see the payload having the updated record, and if I put a debugger in DPC_EXT~changeset_process the field is visible there as well, however when merge call completes the value is removed and is not updated. After final save(or create) also, the value for 'Period To' is updated but 'Period From' remains blank.

I have extended below CDS view to add both of my fields :

  • I_ServiceEntrySheetItem
  • I_ServiceEntrySheetItemTP
  • I_ServiceEntrySheetItemBasic
  • C_ServiceEntrySheetItemWD

 

 

I have also appended my fields in table: srvcentrshtitm_d , this reflected in mmpur_ses_item, as well.

Please let me know what could be the issue and how can I fix this.

#MM-PUR-SVC-SES  MM-PUR-SVC-SES

entry.title: SAC date picker for the last 90 days
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there any way in SAC to set up a date picker filter that always selects the last 90 days from the current date?

We need a date picker for an analysis because the dynamic filter and the lookback do not allow selecting a single date or a specific week in the past.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner – Convert Employment Vendor to Business Partner for new Employee Model
entry.content:
Introduction

You are in the preparation phase to convert your system to SAP S/4HANA. During the execution of the Readiness Check, you encounter the following Simplification Item.

2340095 - S4TWL - Conversion of Employees to Business Partners

One of the initial steps is the conversion of customers and vendors into Business Partners, specifically converting employee vendors/customers to Business Partners.

This blog post outlines a method for establishing number logic during CVI conversion to achieve HCM-BP-Integration number logic in SAP S/4HANA for Employment Business Partners.

For detailed information on the new HCM-BP-Integration data model in SAP S/4HANA, please refer to this blog post.
New Employee Business Partner Data Model in SAP S/4HANA 2020 On-Premise

For detailed description of setting up HCM-BP-Integration at SAP S/4HANA you can follow instructions at

SAP S/4HANA Cookbook - Employee Business Partner Integration as of SAP S/4HANA 2020 with new data model

Target audience: Functional expert, Development expert

Version: SAP ECC 6.0 or higher

 

Prerequisites

When implementing the new model in HCM-BP-Integration with SAP S/4HANA, there is an option to integrate employee vendors and customers into the HCM-BP-Integration model.

Unlike ECC, in SAP S/4HANA, vendor master data can be automatically created based on the provided employment data.

In ECC, the transaction PRAA can be used to generate a vendor based on the given personnel number, with the assignment between vendor and personnel number occurring at the company code level.

In SAP S/4HANA, a Business Partner is initially created using the provided employment data. Depending on the customizing settings, the Business Partner can be extended with a vendor role and associated vendor master data.

One possible option for Business Partner numbering, based on employment data, is to use a combination of the personnel number and an alphanumeric prefix, as shown in this example:

Personnel number: 22345
Business Partner number: PN00022345

 

Target

To ensure consistent numbering logic for both new and existing employment vendors, it is necessary to consider the numbering logic at the CVI conversion stage. Presently, there is no standard solution for creating a Business Partner from a vendor while taking into account the personnel number at the vendor company code segment.

In this blog, I aim to outline a method involving customization and a minor BAdI implementation to achieve a Business Partner number, such as PN00022345, based on the personnel number.

During the CVI conversion, a Business Partner designated as PN00022345 should be established from vendor 114, with the personnel number assignment of 22345.

 

Initial Situation

Employment data

At this screenshot you can see employment assignment to company code DE01.

Vendor data

At this screenshot you can see personnel number assignment of vendor 114 at company code DE01.

 

Configuration

Given Account Group REIS is assigned to Number Range 01 at vendor Account Group setup.

Account Group

REIS

Number Range

01   0000000001 - 0000099999

To achieve the goal of Business Partner numbering based on the Personnel Number of the vendor, we will utilize a "backdoor" in CVI customizing. We will implement external numbering for the Business Partner, which necessitates identical numbering for both the vendor and Business Partner due to CVI customizing constraints.

The "backdoor" involves initially defining the target Business Partner number range to match the vendor number logic precisely. With this configuration, we can proceed with CVI customizing using the same numbering logic. Subsequently, we can adjust the target Business Partner number range to our specific requirements.

Create Business Partner Grouping and Number Range

IMG: Cross-Application Components->SAP Business Partner->Business Partner->Basic Settings->Number Ranges and Groupings->Define Number Ranges

IMG: Cross-Application Components->SAP Business Partner->Business Partner->Basic Settings->Number Ranges and Groupings->Define Groupings and Assign Number Ranges

Note: Business Partner Grouping typically uses four characters. However, for future HCM-BP Integration setups, only two characters are utilized due to character limitations in the SAP S/4HANA HCM-BP Integration scenario.

CVI Mapping

IMG: Cross-Application Components->Master Data Synchronization->Customer/Vendor Integration->Business Partner Settings->Settings for Vendor Integration->Field Assignment for Vendor Integration->Assign Keys->Define Number Assignment for Direction Vendor to BP

 

IMG: Cross-Application Components->Master Data Synchronization->Customer/Vendor Integration->Business Partner Settings->Settings for Vendor Integration->Define BP Role for Direction Vendor to BP

Change Business Partner number range "Backdoor"

IMG: Cross-Application Components->SAP Business Partner->Business Partner->Basic Settings->Number Ranges and Groupings->Define Number Ranges

At this stage of configuration, we have established CVI Mapping such that, for example, vendor 114 corresponds to a Business Partner number range from PN00000000 to PN99999999 with identical numbering. This will inevitably lead to a synchronization error, but we will address this number mapping with a BAdI implementation in the subsequent step.

 

BAdI Implementation

Create your own implementation for BAdI CVI_CUSTOM_MAPPER with method IF_EX_CVI_CUSTOM_MAPPER~MAP_VENDOR_TO_BP

You can find an example in the following coding sample:

 

 

  METHOD if_ex_cvi_custom_mapper~map_vendor_to_bp.
    DATA: lv_pernr   TYPE lfb1-pernr,
          lv_partner TYPE bu_partner,
          ls_company TYPE vmds_ei_company.

    CHECK i_vendor-central_data-central-data-ktokk = 'REIS'.

    READ TABLE i_vendor-company_data-company INTO ls_company INDEX 1.

    CONCATENATE 'PN' ls_company-data-pernr INTO lv_partner.
    MOVE lv_partner TO c_partner-header-object_instance-bpartner.
  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

Convert vendor with MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT

Execute the MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT transaction, ensuring that the synchronization direction from Vendor to Business Partner is enabled. Following the conversion, Business Partners will be generated according to your specified numbering logic.

 

Check result

To check conversion result with transaction CVI_LINKS.

To check a Business Partner, directly run transaction BP with number PN00022345.

To check assigned vendor to Business Partner choose role FLVN00 and navigate to tab "Vendor: General Data".

You can check assigned personnel number by navigating to Company Code data.

 

Conclusion

You have now implemented your own numbering logic for the initial Business Partner conversion. This logic will be applicable for all new vendors of Account Group REIS where a personnel number is provided. Ensure that the personnel number is set as a mandatory field for Account Group REIS to prevent synchronization issues. Alternatively, you could implement an error message in your BAdI implementation if the field LFB1-PERNR is not populated.

Bruno

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud CPS Integration - New Pricing Attr...
entry.content:
Yes, that seems to be the correct approach. So you redefined beans for aliases sapProductConfigPricingItemInputPopulator and sapProductConfigPricingItemInputKBProductPopulator, and still the new attribute hasn't been sent?
Did you validate by setting the log level to DEBUG for de.hybris.platform.sap.productconfig.runtime.cps.impl.CharonPricingFacadeImpl?

Best regards, Christoph

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP Web Intelligence to SAP Datasphere analytic models using OAuth 2.0
entry.content:
Can somoen help clarify something on Step 1.6:

Enter the Redirect URI to specify where OAuth access and refresh tokens are returned in SAP BI Platform. Note that, in SAP BI, OAuth access and refresh tokens are saved and managed per user at the SAP BI Platform level. So, SAP BI platform provides a callback URL allowing to retrieve the OAuth tokens from authorization servers. This callback URL should set as Redirect URI under the following format: https://*<host>[:<port>]*/biprws/v1/oauth2/callback

Is the <host> the bobj host or datasphere host? I'm not able to connect and this is the only part i'm guessing at filling in

Thanks

entry.title: I need to buy SAP Analytics cloud trial base
entry.content: My trial for SAP Analytics cloud ends within 7 days. Anyway to buy it

entry.title: Partial goods issue for the work order through Basic EWM functionality
entry.content:
Partial goods issue for the work order through Basic EWM functionality

We are having the Delivery based production integration in my current project. The client is having the basic EWM functionality. When the process order is requesting the raw materials for the staging area, in EWM we will get the Outbound Delivery. 

As off now, I can be able to issue full OBD quantities to the staging area. But the client ask is to issue the partial quantities with one OBD.

How we can be able to achieve this?

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Enrich Data in SAP Datasphere with Data from RESTful APIs
entry.content:
@KarlHakanNordgr It is possible, yes. However, you need to develop your own REST API (that's not hard btw!) because SAP Datasphere only provides you with APIs to consume data (not to write it to tables).
How? Choose a programming language that a) you are comfortable, b) has HANA client package/library, c) is suitable for exposing a REST API. It will probably be either Node.js, Python, or JAVA. Figure out how to write something to a table using the corresponding HANA client, then figure out how to expose a REST API. Once that works locally, you should think about deployment and of course securing your REST API. Let me know if you need more specific advise.

entry.title: Re: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/securi...
entry.content: Dear Anupam, the issue has been resolved already. I will post a detailed answer shortly. Thanks a lot for your answer

entry.title: How to make hard reservation for production order
entry.content:
Dear team 

Production order reservation is soft allocation how we can convert it to hard allocation so no other order can tag inventory?

 

BR

entry.title: Re: How to Edit a PR that has been synced to Ariba?
entry.content:
Hello,

If any POs are associated with the requisition, there could be issues depending on the PO status. It doesn't sound like you had any POs to go with the PR, so this error could potentially be caused by configuration. 

The info on Cannot cancel a Purchase Requisition (PR) or Purchase Order (PO) helps narrow down what could be the problem.

entry.title: Issue Updating Records in MS Dynamics CRM through SAP Integration Suite using ROJO Dynamics adapter.
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are currently utilizing the MS Dynamics CRM adapter included with the SAP Integration Suite provided by Rojo Consulting. The scenario involves extracting account credit data from the SAP system and transmitting it to the MS Dynamics CRM creditlimit entity. This process should either create new records or update existing records based on primary key fields (limitype and customernumber).

While we have successfully managed to create records in Dynamics,  we are encountering an issue with updating records. Specifically, when the primary keys already exist in the system, any changes to other fields are not being updated as expected.

Steps Taken:

Developed an iFlow for data transmission.

Configured a message mapping to transform data and handle lookup fields.

Verified that all fields are correctly mapped and identified in the Dynamics system.

Issue:

Records are created successfully when the primary keys do not exist.

Updates are not performed when the primary keys already exist in the system, even if other field values have changed.

Error Message :

A record that has the attribute values Customer Number, Limit Type already exists. The entity key Credit Limit Key requires that this set of attributes contains unique values. Select unique values and try again.

Has anyone experienced similar issues with updates not being performed in MS Dynamics CRM using SAP Integration Suite? What steps can we take to ensure that updates are processed correctly?

entry.title: Odata Update/PUT method break point not Triggering
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have created an OData service and applied an external breakpoint in re-registered update method. The Mtart is modified in

left panel as shown below. No code is written inside the method. However, the Breakpoint not triggering and am getting below error message on execution. Can anybody kindly guide how can I resolve the error and get breakpoint trigger.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: A Perfect Wave: Event Driven Business Architecture
entry.content:
HI Karsten,

Thanks for the great information about event options in S/4 HANA. However we are still on ECC 6.0 Ehp7 and it will be a few more years before we upgrade to S/4 HANA. In the meantime, we are interested in using the SAP Add-On for Event Enablement in our current ECC system as a way to enable EDA until we get to S/4 HANA. Can we directly connect the Advance Event Mesh to SAP Add-On for Event Enablement or do we have to use Event Mesh with the Add-on?

Thanks,

Gregg

entry.content: Question updated, for more specified.

entry.title: Re: Adaptive Column Width is not resizing succesfully in SAC
entry.content: I found the cause of the problem. In the relevant table, the Wrap option remains selected.

entry.title: Re: How to make hard reservation for production order
entry.content: Did you already find this answer?

entry.title: Re: Odata Update/PUT method break point not Triggering
entry.content:
Hello,

As the error message says, your payload is incorrect. Try with this one instead:

 

{
    "Matnr" : "017-328095-000_01",
    "Matkl" : "04",
    "Mtart" : "SAN",
    "Mbrsh" : "M"
}

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Change Column name on my Report
entry.content:
I executed a copy of your program, and no problem, fields are correct with correct header texts.

  • Just some warnings on missing unit of measure, perform the ALV consistency check
  • If you executed some tests with less fields defined, reset ALV buffer with report BALVBUFDEL

entry.title: App Server in GCP vs Legacy for Incentive Management
entry.content:
I need to talk with someone who knows the GCP architecture for Incentive Management and can help me connect to the App Server in GCP vs how it's done today in Legacy (Oracle).

Currently, we're running a script in Legacy that checks 2 folders in the App Server for files and if any are found, inserts data into an Oracle table that is used by Advanced Workflow.

We would like to do the same thing in GCP but need some guidance on how to connect to the App Server in that environment.

Please let me know if you need any further information.

Thanks in advance!

Cheers!

Ron

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

My name is Odion, and I am an accountant based in Nigeria with a deep passion for leveraging technology to drive business efficiency. I am writing to express my enthusiastic interest in the SAP Digital Skills Program

I hold a Bachelor's degree in Accounting from The University of Lagos and over the past 4 years, I have gained extensive experience working in various accounting roles. My professional journey has equipped me with a robust understanding of financial management, reporting, and compliance. However, I recognize the growing importance of digital transformation in the finance sector and am eager to expand my expertise in this area.

The SAP Digital Skills Program presents a remarkable opportunity for me to acquire cutting-edge skills in SAP software, which I believe is essential for driving innovation and efficiency in today's dynamic business environment. My strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and commitment to continuous learning make me a good fit for this program. I am particularly excited about the prospect of integrating SAP's powerful tools into my workflow to enhance financial processes and decision-making.

I am confident that participating in this program will not only bolster my technical capabilities but also enable me to contribute more effectively to my organization and the broader accounting community.

Thank you for considering my application. I am looking forward to the possibility of joining this transformative program and contributing to its success.

entry.title: Re: C_SECAUTH_20 SAP System Security and Authorizations -...
entry.content:
Hello,

here is the answer from SAP:

Die beiden Zertifizierungen (C_SECAUTH_20, P_SECAUTH_21), wurden mittlerweile retired und es gibt auch keine Ersatz- bzw. Nachfolge Zertifizierung dafür.
